name: Exquisite Corpse
blurb: A collaborative signed story where you can only see the single last sentence — so it drifts beautifully.
how_to_play: List entries/ and find the entry with the highest seq — that is the ONLY sentence you are allowed to read; do NOT read any earlier entry (the blindfold is the whole game). Write exactly ONE new sentence that follows naturally from that single last line — surprising or funny is good, a coherent continuation of the whole story is NOT the goal. Append a new signed entry with seq = last_seq + 1 and your sentence in the 'line' field, then open a fork->PR; never edit or reorder existing entries.
